meta.title: Business process automation pricing and ROI estimate
meta.description: Get a clear quote for automacao: ERP/CRM/Sheets/API integrations, n8n/Make/Zapier workflows, Python + Apps Script, monitoring dashboards, ROI in hours saved.

hero.h1: business automation cost estimate for your operations
hero.subtitle: Automate ERP, CRM, Sheets, and APIs with monitored workflows and ROI tracked in hours saved.

pain.title: Automation that removes daily friction
bullets: Have you ever spent the last hour of the day copying data between your ERP, CRM, and spreadsheets?
Have you ever chased approvals and repetitive tasks with no visibility into what is stuck or why?
Have you ever had an integration break due to an API change, rate limit, or a missed schedule?

benefits.title: Real integrations
benefits.desc: Connect ERP, CRM, Google Sheets, and external APIs with clear logic, validation, logs, and step-by-step error handling.

benefits.title: Visibility you can trust
benefits.desc: Monitoring dashboards and alerts show what ran, what failed, and what needs action, so you are not guessing.

benefits.title: ROI in hours saved
benefits.desc: We baseline the current manual effort, track hours saved after go-live, and report ROI per automated process.

useCases.title: Customer and lead sync
useCases.desc: Keep contacts, companies, and deals aligned across CRM, ERP, and Sheets with validation and deduplication.

useCases.title: Order and billing status updates
useCases.desc: Use webhooks and APIs to update orders, invoices, and collections automatically when events happen.

useCases.title: Scheduled reconciliations
useCases.desc: Run daily or weekly checks via cron and queues, with retries and reprocessing when systems are slow.

useCases.title: Automated reporting
useCases.desc: Generate Sheets reports and dashboard metrics from consolidated data to reduce close time and manual errors.

useCases.title: Approvals with SLAs
useCases.desc: Route approvals with notifications, deadlines, and an audit trail so decisions move faster without losing control.

stack.title: Tools we can use in your setup

options.name: n8n
options.note: Self-hosted or managed workflows with connectors, webhooks, scheduling, and retry-friendly runs.

options.name: Make
options.note: Visual scenarios for fast app integrations, branching logic, and per-step error handling.

options.name: Zapier
options.note: Event-based automations for sales and ops, ideal for straightforward triggers and actions.

options.name: Python
options.note: Custom scripts and services for advanced rules, API orchestration, queues, and scheduled jobs.

options.name: Google Apps Script
options.note: Google Workspace automation for Sheets, Drive, and Gmail with logging and controlled permissions.

steps.title: Diagnose
steps.desc: You share the process and systems involved, and we define inputs, outputs, rules, and success metrics.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: We implement workflows, scripts, and integrations with webhooks, queues/cron, logging, and safe retries.

steps.title: Monitor
steps.desc: You get dashboards and alerts, plus ROI tracking in hours saved so you can scale what works.

faq.q: How do you estimate business automation cost?
faq.a: We scope the process steps, systems, data volumes, rules, and reliability requirements, then estimate effort, timeline, and operating costs.

faq.q: How fast can you deliver an automation?
faq.a: Simple workflows can go live in days; multi-system integrations with validations, monitoring, and retries usually take a few weeks.

faq.q: Can you integrate my ERP, CRM, Sheets, and APIs?
faq.a: Yes. We use native connectors when available, and fall back to APIs, webhooks, Python, or Apps Script where it fits the system and data needs.

faq.q: How do you handle failures, rate limits, and reprocessing?
faq.a: We add per-step error handling, logging, alerts, backoff for rate limits, queues for bursty workloads, and scheduled checks with cron.

faq.q: How will I know the ROI is real?
faq.a: We capture a baseline of manual time today, measure time saved after launch, and report ROI in hours saved per process and per month.

faq.q: Do I need to grant full access to my systems?
faq.a: No. You can provide least-privilege API keys or service accounts, and we validate permissions and environments before production rollout.

ctaFinal.title: Get a clear scope and ROI estimate
ctaFinal.desc: Share your current workflow and systems, and receive a practical quote with timelines, monitoring, and success metrics.
